message:
refactor(embed,lexical,rerank): extract map_lock_error helpers and handle PolledAfterCompletion explicitly

Replace duplicated inline lock-error match arms across all async writer
lock sites with centralized map_writer_lock_error / map_lock_error
helper methods that exhaustively match all LockError variants.

Previously, the catch-all `_ =>` / `other =>` arms with
#[allow(unreachable_patterns)] silently handled the PolledAfterCompletion
variant (added when asupersync gained explicit future-reuse detection)
as a generic "mutex lock failed" error. Now each variant produces a
specific diagnostic:

- fastembed_embedder.rs (both crates/ root and frankensearch-embed):
  PolledAfterCompletion → "fastembed mutex future reused after completion
  during {phase}" with test
- frankensearch-lexical/lib.rs: extract TantivyIndex::map_writer_lock_error,
  replace 4 inline match blocks in delete/index/batch_index/commit with
  calls to the helper; PolledAfterCompletion → SubsystemError with test
- crates/lib.rs (root crate): same extraction and dedup for the root
  TantivyIndex, eliminating ~60 lines of duplicated match arms
- frankensearch-rerank/lib.rs: PolledAfterCompletion → RerankFailed with
  test; remove #[allow(unreachable_patterns)]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
